detectors.description:
Controlled.changeController(address) (MiniMeToken.sol#139-143) should emit an event for:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (MiniMeToken.sol#413-487):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number) (MiniMeToken.sol#443)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (MiniMeToken.sol#653)
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount)) (MiniMeToken.sol#455)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number) (MiniMeToken.sol#473)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (MiniMeToken.sol#653)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (MiniMeToken.sol#483)
